div.style: font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #333333; padding: 10px 0px;

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-bottom: 20px; border: 1px solid #d1d5db;

td.style: padding: 15px; width: 75%; vertical-align: middle;
padding: 15px; width: 25%; text-align: right; vertical-align: middle; border-left: 1px solid #d1d5db; background-color: #f9fafb;

span.style: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #7f8c8d; display: block; margin-bottom: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-bottom: 25px; border: 1px solid #d1d5db;

td.style: width: 15%; padding: 9px 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #4b5563; background-color: #f9fafb; border-bottom: 1px solid #d1d5db;
width: 35%; padding: 9px 10px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a252f; border-bottom: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;
width: 15%; padding: 9px 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #4b5563; background-color: #f9fafb; border-bottom: 1px solid #d1d5db;
width: 35%; padding: 9px 10px; color: #1a252f; border-bottom: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 9px 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #4b5563; background-color: #f9fafb; border-bottom: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 9px 10px; color: #1a252f; border-bottom: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 9px 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #4b5563; background-color: #f9fafb; border-bottom: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 9px 10px; color: #1a252f; border-bottom: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 9px 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #4b5563; background-color: #f9fafb; border-bottom: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 9px 10px; color: #1a252f; border-bottom: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 9px 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #4b5563; background-color: #f9fafb; border-bottom: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 9px 10px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a252f; border-bottom: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 9px 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #4b5563; background-color: #f9fafb;
padding: 9px 10px; color: #1a252f; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 9px 10px; font-weight: 600; color: #4b5563; background-color: #f9fafb;
padding: 9px 10px; color: #1a252f;

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-bottom: 40px; border: 1px solid #d1d5db;

th.style: padding: 10px; text-align: center; width: 8%; font-weight: 600; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 10px; text-align: left; width: 44%; font-weight: 600; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 10px; text-align: right; width: 12%; font-weight: 600; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 10px; text-align: right; width: 12%; font-weight: 600; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 10px; text-align: right; width: 12%; font-weight: 600; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;

td.style: padding: 10px; text-align: center; color: #6b7280; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 10px; font-weight: 500; color: #111827; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 10px; text-align: right; color: #374151; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 10px; text-align: right; font-weight: 600; color: #111827; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 10px; text-align: right; font-weight: 600; color: #16a34a; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;
padding: 10px; text-align: center; color: #6b7280;

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 20px; border: 1px solid #d1d5db;

td.style: width: 33.33%; text-align: center; vertical-align: bottom; padding: 25px 10px 15px 10px; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;

div.style: color: #2c3e50; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 15px; min-height: 35px; display: block;

span.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 11px; color: #4b5563; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

td.style: width: 33.33%; text-align: center; vertical-align: bottom; padding: 25px 10px 15px 10px; border-right: 1px solid #d1d5db;

div.style: color: #2c3e50; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 15px; min-height: 35px; display: block;

span.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 11px; color: #4b5563; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;

td.style: width: 33.33%; text-align: center; vertical-align: bottom; padding: 25px 10px 15px 10px;

div.style: color: #2c3e50; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 15px; min-height: 35px; display: block;

span.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 11px; color: #4b5563; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;
